programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Sabrina Ghayour and Shivi Ramoutar and special guest Jack Savoretti. Olly Smith joins via video link to pick wines to go with the studio dishes

programme.title: Our Food, Our Family with Michela Chiappa
programme.desc: The Welsh-Italian cook meets four generations of food lovers in Cardiff. While joining the Aslams to rustle up some of their favourite curries, fish dishes and a keema bolognese, Michela meets 90-year-old head of the family Mohammed, who came from Bangladesh in 1958 and went on to open one of Wales' very first Asian restaurants. Michela tries to prise the family's secret spice mix as well as helping grandson Yusuf to master one of his grandmother's specialities to bring along to a special party to celebrate his grandparents' 54th wedding anniversary

programme.title: Tennis: Eastbourne
programme.desc: The Viking International Eastbourne. Clare Balding presents coverage of the women's singles final on day five from Devonshire Park Lawn Tennis Club. Karolina Pliskova of the Czech Republic took the honours when this tournament was last staged in 2019, prevailing 6-1, 6-4 against Germany's 2018 Wimbledon champion Angelique Kerber in the showpiece match

programme.title: MOTD Live: UEFA Euro 2020
programme.desc: Wales v Denmark (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the opening match in the last 16, which takes place at Johan Cruijff ArenA in Amsterdam. Wales only won one of their group matches, but that victory against Turkey and their draw against Switzerland was enough to see them finish second behind Italy, who romped through the group stage, winning all three matches without conceding a goal. Denmark seemed to be heading for an early exit after losing their opening two fixtures against Finland and Belgium, but a remarkable 4-1 thumping of Russia, and other results going their way, saw them progress as Group B runners-up

programme.title: MOTD Live: UEFA Euro 2020
programme.desc: Italy v Austria (Kick-off 8.00pm). All the action from the second last-16 fixture, which takes place at Wembley Stadium. The Italians have been one of the outstanding teams in the tournament so far, moving from dark horses to being one of the favourites to lift the trophy. They defeated both Turkey and Switzerland 3-0, before dominating Wales in a 1-0 victory to stretch their winning record to 10 consecutive matches, all of which have been without conceding a single goal. Austria finished second behind the Netherlands in Group C, defeating North Macedonia and Ukraine to progress beyond the opening group phase of a major tournament for the first time since 1982

programme.title: Elis James' Feast of Football
programme.desc: Elis James is joined by guests Danny Gabbidon and Jayne Ludlow, for all the reaction to Wales' last 16 match against Denmark

programme.title: Match of the Day Top 10
programme.desc: Gary Lineker and a panel of BBC pundits discuss the latest Top 10

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Euro 2020 Replay
programme.desc: Wales v Denmark. Another chance to see the opening match in the last 16, which took place at Johan Cruijff ArenA in Amsterdam

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: Andrew Marr is joined by Northern Ireland secretary Brandon Lewis MP, Mayor of London Sadiq Khan and Chair of Nervtag Professor Sir Peter Horby. The newspapers are reviewed by BBC Newsnight's political editor Nick Watt

programme.title: Politics Wales
programme.desc: James Williams presents the latest political news and debate, and reports from around Wales

programme.title: Sunday Morning Live
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher presents topical debate covering religious, moral and ethical issues, with guest panellists and contributions from viewers

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Anna Larkin thinks Australia will offer her son the perfect lifestyle, but husband Aaron is moving nowhere until they have spent a trial week in Brisbane. With Nicki Chapman

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin oversees proceedings from Topsham in Devon, where experts Danny Sebastian and Gary Pe provide assistance to two teams looking for items to sell at auction

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Claire McCollum meets the Princess Royal on the Scottish island of Iona, and joins others inspired by its special atmosphere as a place of Christian pilgrimage

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers' opinions on BBC shows and behind-the-scenes reports on new programmes

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Kym Marsh presents an appeal on behalf of the Lullaby Trust, a charity that offers emotional and practical support to families who have lost a young child

programme.title: Early Man (2018)
programme.desc: Young Dug's sheltered life with his Stone Age tribe is shattered by bronze-mining invaders led by greedy Lord Nooth. To win his home back, desperate Dug gambles on challenging these more sophisticated folk in a contest they love, but he only knows from rock paintings - football. Director Nick Park's animated adventure, with the voices of Eddie Redmayne, Timothy Spall, Rob Brydon, Miriam Margolyes and Johnny Vegas

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades rescues another selection of items from the recycling centre, giving two metal chairs to upholsterer Simion Hawtin-Smith and a loom chair and cabinet to furniture restyler Chloe Kempster. For his own project, Jay transforms a pair of old wardrobe doors

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Arit Anderson transform an out-dated old garden into a luxurious outdoor space for Sarah and Tristan in Stevenage

programme.title: Weatherman Walking
programme.desc: Derek Brockway appreciates the scenery of Berwyn Mountains in north-east Wales on a walk in which the presenter is accompanied by a pair of llamas. Derek also visits Tenby, leaving the tourist hotspots behind to discover more about the town's hidden past

programme.title: Tudur's TV Flashback
programme.desc: Comedian Tudur Owen rewinds funny and fascinating clips from half a century and more of Welsh television. This time he is on a Welsh world tour, bumping into flying tea ladies, American tourists and globe-trotting gnomes

programme.title: Pizza Boys
programme.desc: Documentary following best friends Jez and Ieuan as they set out to take part in the World Pizza Championship in their old Italian van with an oven in the back

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Adam Henson and Charlotte Smith present the show from the Cumbrian Hills, and catch up with a farming mother and son who are diversifying to make ends meet. Charlotte also reports on efforts to protect the surrounding landscape. Plus, Joe Crowley investigates a worrying rise in attacks on livestock by dogs off the leash

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits some of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, attracting large crowds intent on finding out what their hidden treasures are worth

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a selection of eight of the most extraordinary sequences from Planet Earth II and Blue Planet II, with a new soundtrack by Hans Zimmer, Jacob Shea and the team at Bleeding Fingers - performed by the BBC Concert Orchestra and Mercury Award-winning rapper Dave on the grand piano. The film ranges from the East Cape of South Africa to the north of Norway and from Chile to the Indian Ocean to show how animals overcome adversity to survive and thrive in some of the world's most challenging environments

programme.title: Crouchy's Year Late Euros: Live
programme.desc: Peter Crouch, Maya Jama and Alex Horne delve into all the big matches as the knockout games get underway, with celebrity guests and a few surprises

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third and fourth last-16 matches, which were Netherlands v Czech Republic at Puskas Arena in Budapest and Belgium v Portugal at Estadio La Cartuja in Seville

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Euro 2020 Replay
programme.desc: Belgium v Portugal. A chance to see the last-16 match at Estadio La Cartuja in Seville

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell visit a former bank and a two-bed semi in Lancashire, and a one bedroom flat with a garage in Levenshulme, Manchester

programme.title: Murder, Mystery and My Family
programme.desc: Criminal barristers Sasha Wass and Jeremy Dein reexamine the case of an 18-year-old hotel employee who was accused of murdering a titled guest in 1922

programme.title: Island Medics
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the Gilbert Bain Hospital in Lerwick, following the work of those providing emergency and medical care to the Shetland Islands' 23,000 residents

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles hosts the show from Norfolk's biggest Antique Centre in King's Lynn. Experts Caroline Hawley and Mark Stacey assist the Reds and the Blues as they do battle

programme.title: BBC Wales Today; Weather
programme.desc: News and weather from BBC Wales

programme.title: Wimbledon 2021
programme.desc: Sue Barker presents coverage of the opening day from the All England Club, as the first round continues in the men's and ladies' singles competitions. There was a major upset on Centre Court on day one when the tournament was last held in 2019, with Yulia Putintseva defeating second seed Naomi Osaka 7-6, 6-2. This was followed by a straight-sets victory for home favourite Kyle Edmund over Jaume Munar, and the London resident will hope the support of the fans can help him to go far this time around. Elsewhere, Karolina Pliskova followed up her triumph at Eastbourne with a 6-2, 7-6 victory over Zhu Lin, and Coco Gauff demonstrated her enormous potential when she prevailed 6-4, 6-4 against five-time champion Venus Williams at the age of just 15

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Bernie tells Tiffany the weight-loss pills are not working fast enough and she needs stronger ones but her friend refuses. Vi encourages Stuart and Rainie to find a distraction from Abi, prompting them to make a decision about the surrogacy. Rocky has an idea to bring Mila and Iqra back together, while Isaac tells Lola he has a surprise for her

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Tiffany reluctantly gives more pills to Bernie, who is disappointed to discover she has not lost as much weight as she had hoped - convincing her she has blown her chance of becoming Rainie's surrogate. Isaac pays a visit to Ruby at the club - and he has plenty to say - and Kathy helps to clear the air between Mila and Iqra

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Lucky tries to overcome her personal crisis by throwing herself into work. But in her eagerness to go above and beyond she oversteps the mark. A patient accuses Dominic of leaving an unwanted item in his body during an operation, and Kylie put her foot in it with her flatmates

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich Brothers compete to design an Ibiza-themed party garden for a family in Wokingham, Berkshire. All concerned hope to come up with some cool ideas to transform this unloved plot into a laid-back Balearic chill out lounge on a budget of £3,000

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Olivia Colman finds some surprises in her ancestral history, and her belief that most of those in her family tree emanate from Norfolk turns out to be far from the truth. Olivia is astonished to discover that she needs to travel to India to find out more about her great-great-great grandmother Harriot, who was an orphan in 1811 on a ship bound for England from Calcutta. Harriot's father was an an Englishman, but the identity of her mother, who gave birth to her in a remote Indian village, is a mystery Olivia delights in solving

programme.title: Do Black Lives Still Matter?
programme.desc: Grime artist Saskilla concludes the series with a look at ongoing issues with diversity in the music industry, questioning the long-term benefits of the Blackout Tuesday social media campaign and if the money pledged by major labels is enough to bring about lasting change

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the fifth and sixth last-16 matches, which were Croatia v Spain at Parken in Copenhagen and France v Switzerland at National Arena Bucharest

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You
programme.desc: Citizen Khan star Adil Ray hosts an extended edition of the satirical quiz, with comedian Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Conservative MP Nicky Morgan joining team captains Ian Hislop and Paul Merton to poke fun at the week's events

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Euro 2020 Replay
programme.desc: France v Switzerland. A chance to see the sixth match in the last 16, which took place at National Arena Bucharest

programme.title: Landward
programme.desc: Dougie Vipond visits the Royal Highland Show, where he meets competitors who have travelled to Ingliston to show off their animals to a worldwide, digital audience. Plus, a look at conservationist and writer Polly Pullar's efforts to rehabilitate red squirrels

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: Adam Henson and Charlotte Smith present the show from the Cumbrian Hills, and catch up with a farming mother and son who are diversifying to make ends meet. Charlotte also reports on efforts to protect the surrounding landscape. Plus, Joe Crowley investigates a worrying rise in attacks on livestock by dogs off the leash

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits some of Britain's most sumptuous and unusual locations, attracting large crowds intent on finding out what their hidden treasures are worth

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a selection of eight of the most extraordinary sequences from Planet Earth II and Blue Planet II, with a new soundtrack by Hans Zimmer, Jacob Shea and the team at Bleeding Fingers - performed by the BBC Concert Orchestra and Mercury Award-winning rapper Dave on the grand piano. The film ranges from the East Cape of South Africa to the north of Norway and from Chile to the Indian Ocean to show how animals overcome adversity to survive and thrive in some of the world's most challenging environments

programme.title: Crouchy's Year Late Euros: Live
programme.desc: Peter Crouch, Maya Jama and Alex Horne delve into all the big matches as the knockout games get underway, with celebrity guests and a few surprises

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the third and fourth last-16 matches, which were Netherlands v Czech Republic at Puskas Arena in Budapest and Belgium v Portugal at Estadio La Cartuja in Seville

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Euro 2020 Replay
programme.desc: Belgium v Portugal. A chance to see the last-16 match at Estadio La Cartuja in Seville

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Kym Marsh and Gethin Jones host the weekday magazine show featuring a mixture of topical chat and expert advice

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell visit a former bank and a two-bed semi in Lancashire, and a one bedroom flat with a garage in Levenshulme, Manchester

programme.title: Murder, Mystery and My Family
programme.desc: Criminal barristers Sasha Wass and Jeremy Dein reexamine the case of an 18-year-old hotel employee who was accused of murdering a titled guest in 1922

programme.title: Island Medics
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at the Gilbert Bain Hospital in Lerwick, following the work of those providing emergency and medical care to the Shetland Islands' 23,000 residents

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles hosts the show from Norfolk's biggest Antique Centre in King's Lynn. Experts Caroline Hawley and Mark Stacey assist the Reds and the Blues as they do battle

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: Wimbledon 2021
programme.desc: Sue Barker presents coverage of the opening day from the All England Club, as the first round continues in the men's and ladies' singles competitions. There was a major upset on Centre Court on day one when the tournament was last held in 2019, with Yulia Putintseva defeating second seed Naomi Osaka 7-6, 6-2. This was followed by a straight-sets victory for home favourite Kyle Edmund over Jaume Munar, and the London resident will hope the support of the fans can help him to go far this time around. Elsewhere, Karolina Pliskova followed up her triumph at Eastbourne with a 6-2, 7-6 victory over Zhu Lin, and Coco Gauff demonstrated her enormous potential when she prevailed 6-4, 6-4 against five-time champion Venus Williams at the age of just 15

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Bernie tells Tiffany the weight-loss pills are not working fast enough and she needs stronger ones but her friend refuses. Vi encourages Stuart and Rainie to find a distraction from Abi, prompting them to make a decision about the surrogacy. Rocky has an idea to bring Mila and Iqra back together, while Isaac tells Lola he has a surprise for her

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Tiffany reluctantly gives more pills to Bernie, who is disappointed to discover she has not lost as much weight as she had hoped - convincing her she has blown her chance of becoming Rainie's surrogate. Isaac pays a visit to Ruby at the club - and he has plenty to say - and Kathy helps to clear the air between Mila and Iqra

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Lucky tries to overcome her personal crisis by throwing herself into work. But in her eagerness to go above and beyond she oversteps the mark. A patient accuses Dominic of leaving an unwanted item in his body during an operation, and Kylie put her foot in it with her flatmates

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and the Rich Brothers compete to design an Ibiza-themed party garden for a family in Wokingham, Berkshire. All concerned hope to come up with some cool ideas to transform this unloved plot into a laid-back Balearic chill out lounge on a budget of £3,000

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Olivia Colman finds some surprises in her ancestral history, and her belief that most of those in her family tree emanate from Norfolk turns out to be far from the truth. Olivia is astonished to discover that she needs to travel to India to find out more about her great-great-great grandmother Harriot, who was an orphan in 1811 on a ship bound for England from Calcutta. Harriot's father was an an Englishman, but the identity of her mother, who gave birth to her in a remote Indian village, is a mystery Olivia delights in solving

programme.title: Countryside College
programme.desc: After the Christmas break the CAFRE students are back for another busy term, which offers new life and new experiences on the campuses. At the Enniskillen campus, well-known jockey and three-time Cheltenham winner Derek O'Connor is visiting the equine students to share his top tips

programme.title: Do Black Lives Still Matter?
programme.desc: Grime artist Saskilla concludes the series with a look at ongoing issues with diversity in the music industry, questioning the long-term benefits of the Blackout Tuesday social media campaign and if the money pledged by major labels is enough to bring about lasting change

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the fifth and sixth last-16 matches, which were Croatia v Spain at Parken in Copenhagen and France v Switzerland at National Arena Bucharest

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle
programme.desc: Barra Best makes a journey across the river network, meeting people who work, live and play along its banks,and exploring places and landscapes rarely seen on TV screens

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Euro 2020 Replay
programme.desc: France v Switzerland. A chance to see the sixth match in the last 16, which took place at National Arena Bucharest

programme.title: The Masked Singer US
programme.desc: Group C of the celebrities hit the stage as Night Angel, Bear, Astronaut, T-Rex, Rhino and Swan try to impress Jenny McCarthy, Robin Thicke, Nicole Scherzinger and Ken Jeong

programme.title: The Masked Singer US
programme.desc: Astronaut, Night Angel, T-Rex, Swan and Rhino perform for guest judge Joel McHale and the rest of the panel. Nick Cannon presents as one of the singers is unmasked and sent home

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Rebecca Maddern, Ben Fordham and Freddie Flintoff present the Down Under version of the show in which contestants take on a formidable assault course in Melbourne, with obstacles including the Floating Steps, the Swing Surfer, the Tuning Forks, Rolling Steel, Spinball Wizard and the Double Warped Walls

programme.title: Goosebumps (2015)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers his new neighbour is the writer of a popular series of books, who harbours a terrifying secret. The ghosts and monsters the author writes about are real, and his stories keep them contained. The youngster accidentally releases them into the real world, and has to find a way to get them back in the books before they can cause chaos. Fantasy adventure, starring Jack Black and Dylan Minnette

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Netherlands v Czech Republic (Kick-off 5.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the third match in the last 16, which takes place at Puskas Arena in Budapest. Frank de Boer's Dutch outfit enjoyed the luxury of knowing they would finish top of Group C after just two matches, with their victories over Ukraine and Austria leaving them in an unsurmountable position in the group. They also enjoyed playing all of their group games in Amsterdam, but have now moved to Budapest to face the Czechs, whose only victory so far came against Scotland in their opening fixture

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Belgium v Portugal (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the fourth match in the last 16, which comes from Estadio La Cartuja in Seville. Belgium won all three of their group matches against Russia, Denmark and Finland, and are one of the favourites to lift the trophy, which would be the first time they've won either a World Cup or European Championship were they to be successful. Much has been made of their so-called Golden Generation of players, including Romelu Lukaku, Kevin de Bruyne and Eden Hazard, but being drawn against the defending champions, for whom Cristiano Ronaldo has been to the fore, represents one of the toughest challenges they could face

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Unseen Adventures
programme.desc: The actress introduces more previously unaired footage from her travelogue programmes, this time focusing on her journeys to India and Uzbekistan. Joanna shares some previously unseen moments and provides viewers with an insight into the making of the series. In this episode, she travels the length of India, including footage of her encounters with the flower-sellers of Madurai, before taking us back to Uzbekistan, where she reveals some gory tales of the country's history and discovers the secrets of gem-making

programme.title: Martin Clunes: My Travels and Other Animals
programme.desc: Martin's labrador puppy Arthur goes to dog training, but he does not see Martin as the pack leader. In Malibu Hills, he meets one of the most famous dog families, that of Lassie, then travels to the Arabian desert to ride with Bedouin horseman Ali Al Ameri, who trains the world's oldest man-made horses - the Arabian - for TV shows. Martin then spends time with Josef Svoboda, a logging superstar from the Czech Republic who uses heavy horses in his work

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary marking the 60th birthday of Diana, Princess of Wales. It follows her journey from nursery assistant to global superstar. Told in the present tense, the film draws on archive footage and rarely heard testimony to illustrate the most iconic moments of the Princess's life

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Croatia v Spain (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the fifth last-16 match, which takes place at Parken in Copenhagen. Croatia's victory over Scotland in their final group game helped them to finish second in Group D despite them losing 1-0 to England and drawing with the Czech Republic. Three-time winners Spain were hit by Covid in their camp and drew their opening two group fixtures against Sweden and Poland, but came into form in their match against Slovakia, recording an impressive 5-0 victory to finish second in Group E behind the Swedes

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: France v Switzerland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the sixth match in the last 16, which takes place at National Arena Bucharest. Group F was the dreaded 'Group of Death' on paper, with holders Portugal, world champions France and three-time winners Germany drawn together alongside Hungary, and it was the French who finished top of the pile despite their only victory coming in their opener against Germany. Switzerland also only won one of their group matches, against Turkey, and will start as heavy underdogs against one of the tournament favourites

As the case progresses, Barnaby becomes the thief's latest victim and it emerges that several high-society friends with connections to gangsters and a police chief have a few secrets worth killing for. programme.desc: Group C of the celebrities hit the stage as Night Angel, Bear, Astronaut, T-Rex, Rhino and Swan try to impress Jenny McCarthy, Robin Thicke, Nicole Scherzinger and Ken Jeong

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Rebecca Maddern, Ben Fordham and Freddie Flintoff present the Down Under version of the show in which contestants take on a formidable assault course in Melbourne, with obstacles including the Floating Steps, the Swing Surfer, the Tuning Forks, Rolling Steel, Spinball Wizard and the Double Warped Walls

programme.title: Goosebumps (2015)
programme.desc: A teenager discovers his new neighbour is the writer of a popular series of books, who harbours a terrifying secret. The ghosts and monsters the author writes about are real, and his stories keep them contained. The youngster accidentally releases them into the real world, and has to find a way to get them back in the books before they can cause chaos. Fantasy adventure, starring Jack Black and Dylan Minnette

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Netherlands v Czech Republic (Kick-off 5.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the third match in the last 16, which takes place at Puskas Arena in Budapest. Frank de Boer's Dutch outfit enjoyed the luxury of knowing they would finish top of Group C after just two matches, with their victories over Ukraine and Austria leaving them in an unsurmountable position in the group. They also enjoyed playing all of their group games in Amsterdam, but have now moved to Budapest to face the Czechs, whose only victory so far came against Scotland in their opening fixture

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Belgium v Portugal (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the fourth match in the last 16, which comes from Estadio La Cartuja in Seville. Belgium won all three of their group matches against Russia, Denmark and Finland, and are one of the favourites to lift the trophy, which would be the first time they've won either a World Cup or European Championship were they to be successful. Much has been made of their so-called Golden Generation of players, including Romelu Lukaku, Kevin de Bruyne and Eden Hazard, but being drawn against the defending champions, for whom Cristiano Ronaldo has been to the fore, represents one of the toughest challenges they could face

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Unseen Adventures
programme.desc: The actress introduces more previously unaired footage from her travelogue programmes, this time focusing on her journeys to India and Uzbekistan. Joanna shares some previously unseen moments and provides viewers with an insight into the making of the series. In this episode, she travels the length of India, including footage of her encounters with the flower-sellers of Madurai, before taking us back to Uzbekistan, where she reveals some gory tales of the country's history and discovers the secrets of gem-making

programme.title: Martin Clunes: My Travels and Other Animals
programme.desc: Martin's labrador puppy Arthur goes to dog training, but he does not see Martin as the pack leader. In Malibu Hills, he meets one of the most famous dog families, that of Lassie, then travels to the Arabian desert to ride with Bedouin horseman Ali Al Ameri, who trains the world's oldest man-made horses - the Arabian - for TV shows. Martin then spends time with Josef Svoboda, a logging superstar from the Czech Republic who uses heavy horses in his work

programme.title: Diana
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary marking the 60th birthday of Diana, Princess of Wales. It follows her journey from nursery assistant to global superstar. Told in the present tense, the film draws on archive footage and rarely heard testimony to illustrate the most iconic moments of the Princess's life

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: Croatia v Spain (Kick-off 5.00pm). Coverage of the fifth last-16 match, which takes place at Parken in Copenhagen. Croatia's victory over Scotland in their final group game helped them to finish second in Group D despite them losing 1-0 to England and drawing with the Czech Republic. Three-time winners Spain were hit by Covid in their camp and drew their opening two group fixtures against Sweden and Poland, but came into form in their match against Slovakia, recording an impressive 5-0 victory to finish second in Group E behind the Swedes

programme.title: UEFA Euro 2020 Live
programme.desc: France v Switzerland (Kick-off 8.00pm). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the sixth match in the last 16, which takes place at National Arena Bucharest. Group F was the dreaded 'Group of Death' on paper, with holders Portugal, world champions France and three-time winners Germany drawn together alongside Hungary, and it was the French who finished top of the pile despite their only victory coming in their opener against Germany. Switzerland also only won one of their group matches, against Turkey, and will start as heavy underdogs against one of the tournament favourites

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick and Sam's first Father's Day together proves eventful. A returning Leanne is horrified to hear the sound of gunshots, and finds Nick and Sam sprawled on the ground. Billy's worried when Summer starts acting strangely. Bernie and Paul put pressure on Gemma to allow Aled his operation

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita's shocked to find Sharon in her flat, having taken a beating from Harvey's gang for trying to warn Leanne. Summer is horrified to realise Billy and Todd think she has an eating disorder. Emma flirts with Curtis in the bistro

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: As Harvey's trial gets underway, Leanne enters the witness box. Carol calls at the Rovers saying she wants out of Double Glammy. Curtis is confused by Emma's noticeably cooler attitude and confides in Steve

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: As Fiz continues to mock Tyrone, he reveals he's booked them a mediation session. Sharon packs her bag and tells Rita that after giving evidence she fears for her life. With a potential buyer due, Daisy suggests to Jenny that she take out a loan and they buy the pub together

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings is staying with friends when wealthy heiress Mrs Inglethorp is murdered. He calls in Hercule Poirot to help him solve the baffling crime, which has the whole household under suspicion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth, with Hugh Fraser, Pauline Moran, Anthony Calf and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear in the tiny village of Monks Barton amid rumours of witchcraft and haunted woods. As Barnaby and Jones investigate, psychic Cyrus LeVanu clashes with cleric Wallace Stone over their different methods of 'healing' the woods, while other locals seem to be caught up in a stolen antiques racket. When a body is unearthed and the death toll rises, the detectives race to catch the killer by finding a connection between the missing couples and the thefts. Anton Lesser guest stars, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective suspects a connection between the death of a student with secret plans for advancement and the killing of well-known criminal Nicky Turnball, who was in Oxford to speak at the Union. As Lewis and Hathaway eliminate suspects from a long list of the crook's enemies, the investigation brings him into contact with old flame Diane - who also happens to be Turnball's wife. Kevin Whately stars, with Laurence Fox and Gina McKee

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A ritual killing in a village church points to the work of a satanic cult, but the detective thinks local animosity might actually hold the key to the mystery. Detective drama, starring Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings and the Belgian supersleuth investigate a baffling gangland murder which draws them both into the underworld of London's Little Italy. Miss Lemon turns out to have a link with the victim's valet. Whodunit, starring David Suchet and Hugh Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A prestigious golf club is the setting for murder when a player is bludgeoned to death on the 13th hole. Barnaby and Jones discover gambling, illegal money-lending and assault are rife among the snobbish members, who are also dismissive of the local villagers and only allow them on the course for a few hours a week. Before long, another body turns up, making the detectives doubly determined to catch this terror of the fairways. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Nicholas Le Prevost, John Standing and real-life golfer Sam Torrance

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a spy is revealed when a former agent is killed after a cricket match between the villagers and the gentry. The dead man's wounds appear to have been inflicted by a giant claw, triggering rumours of a 'beast of Midsomer', and before long, another body turns up with similar injuries. Barnaby then realises the incidents are linked to the time the local network of spies spent in Cold War Berlin. John Nettles and Jason Hughes star, with guest appearances by Anna Massey, Peter Davison and Neil Stuke

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of a journalist has chilling echoes of a 1960s horror film starring Midsomer's own Stella Harris. When the actress's more famous sister Diana returns after a 40-year family rift, the body count rises, with each crime reminiscent of a movie plot - giving Barnaby and Jones what looks like a disturbing case of life imitating art. Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes star, with Harriet Walter and Sinead Cusack

programme.title: Sanditon
programme.desc: It's the final visit to the Sunday night period drama, giving viewers a chance to find out how writer Andrew Davies has brought his adaptation of Jane Austen's unfinished novel to an end. On the night of the Midsummer Ball, romantic interests are finally resolved. However, the fate of Sanditon is in the balance when events conspire to leave Charlotte and the Parker family facing down impossible choices. Rose Williams stars as the feisty heroine, with Theo James, Anne Reid and Kris Marshall

programme.title: Live British Touring Car Championship

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Inspector Blake is involved in an accident aboard Stan's bus, so all crews are forced to carry medical kits on their vehicles and undergo first aid training. Comedy, with Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University science fellow George Jeffers threatens to make public a problem with his state-of-the-art invention Kernel Logic, which he believes is potentially lethal, but American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out. When a schoolteacher is killed in a hit-and-run, Barnaby suspects Jeffers was the intended target. Detective drama, guest starring David Haig and Nigel Whitmey, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A body is found buried on the Northumberland moors which could be a missing teenager from the nearby rural community of Brindale. The girl had disappeared six weeks previously, and Vera has to break the news to her devastated family. However, the realisation that she died so close to home rather than at a music festival as originally thought creates tension among her neighbours, who are soon suspecting each other of murder. The detective delves into the vulnerable young woman's isolated existence to identify her killer

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman is killed in a mysterious explosion aboard his fishing boat and suspicion falls on his son, Wycliffe feels sure the real culprit is to be found elsewhere and unearths several locals with a motive for murder. Jack Shepherd stars as the Cornish copper, with Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The detective and his team embark on a race against time to recapture a dangerous convict who has escaped from Bodmin prison - a case that leads them to an elaborate drugs racket. Starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters, Jimmy Yuill and Sean Chapman

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Nick and Sam's first Father's Day together proves eventful. A returning Leanne is horrified to hear the sound of gunshots, and finds Nick and Sam sprawled on the ground. Billy's worried when Summer starts acting strangely. Bernie and Paul put pressure on Gemma to allow Aled his operation

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita's shocked to find Sharon in her flat, having taken a beating from Harvey's gang for trying to warn Leanne. Summer is horrified to realise Billy and Todd think she has an eating disorder. Emma flirts with Curtis in the bistro

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: As Harvey's trial gets underway, Leanne enters the witness box. Carol calls at the Rovers saying she wants out of Double Glammy. Curtis is confused by Emma's noticeably cooler attitude and confides in Steve

programme.desc: As Fiz continues to mock Tyrone, he reveals he's booked them a mediation session. Sharon packs her bag and tells Rita that after giving evidence she fears for her life. With a potential buyer due, Daisy suggests to Jenny that she take out a loan and they buy the pub together

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick helps a woman claiming she is being harassed by a mysterious stalker, and discovers the culprit is closer to home than anticipated. Greengrass gets up to his old tricks again - this time trying to persuade a group of wealthy Australians he is a long-lost relative. Drama, starring Nick Berry, Bill Maynard and Juliette Gruber.

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid arranges a fishing weekend, blissfully unaware Jean's father is coming to stay. Classic family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Owing to a little white lie on his income tax returns, Mr Roper must quickly acquire a son. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy farmer Martin Strickland is discovered bound to a tree, doused in truffle oil and mauled to death by a wild boar, the investigation leads DCI Barnaby to tyrannical celebrity chef Ruth Cameron at the upmarket Wyvern House restaurant. However, secrets from the past surface after the murderer strikes again, and the repercussions are felt further than they were originally intended. With Neil Dudgeon, Neil McCaul, Sharon Small, Marc Elliott and Arabella Weir

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jo is concerned that her father is not managing without his wife and emotions boil over after a car accident. Meanwhile, Greengrass's brother arrives in the village

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Emily confides in Butch about her father spending Christmas alone. Detective Spalding uncovers new evidence. Chris decides to attend Liam's funeral

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris infuriates Zoe by telling her he paid for Liam's funeral. Diane flirts with Turner. Paddy and Lisa argue over what to do with the cottage

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Les and Janice grow frustrated as the police hunt for Neil and Toyah. Sally worries about what Kevin has found out. Alec plans to run the Rovers with Rita

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally asks Greg to tell Maxine about them. Les is surprised when Toyah hugs him and thanks him for his support. Jim is thrilled when he feels a twinge in his leg

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The detective investigates a suspected kidnapping and gets his first lead when a ransom note is discovered. The missing woman then turns up dead at the wheel of a crashed car, smelling of alcohol. Whodunit, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Nelson discover that the exciting world of stunt pilots and military heroes hides many dark secrets after the owner of Finchmere Airfield is hit on the head and dropped to his death from a plane. Are anti-aircraft campaigners behind Bernard King's murder, or is the incident linked to a tragic Second World War mission? Neil Dudgeon and Gwilym Lee are joined by guest stars including June Whitfield, Robert Bathurst, Bernard Cribbins and Laila Rouass

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Ethel's flirting with Major Bryant lands her in trouble as preparations get under way for a concert at Downton. Tensions flare between Isobel and Cora, Edith receives worrying news about Matthew and William, while Branson declares his feelings for Sybil. Mrs Bird's soup kitchen receives a helping hand from Daisy and Mrs Patmore. Costume drama, starring Penelope Wilton and Elizabeth McGovern

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a housewife is found hanged in her home, the police initially mark it down as suicide. However, a meeting with an Oxford law professor prompts a sceptical Lewis and Hathaway to believe something more sinister is afoot - a suspicion confirmed by the death of another woman. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The son of a high-profile Jewish businessman is attacked in the grounds of a university, leaving Foyle to consider the possibility that the attack was racially motivated. Meanwhile, in London, tensions mount as charismatic right-wing leader Guy Spencer is released from prison. But is he being set up to take the spotlight off a dangerous espionage operation involving MI6? Elsewhere, Sam becomes acutely aware of the impact of the war on Adam's constituents as she encounters a young boy suffering from whooping cough. Michael Kitchen stars in the 1940s-set crime drama, with Honeysuckle Weeks and Daniel Weyman

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: The royal family settle into the peace and solitude of Osborne House, their estate on the Isle of Wight, but the outside world is soon making its presence felt as Palmerston stirs up trouble in Westminster. Frustrated at the brewing conflict in parliament, Victoria is forced to summon both Palmerston and Russell to her estate to resolve the situation. On a more domestic front, nocturnal liaisons send gossip rippling through the royal court. Historical drama, starring Jenna Coleman and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Victoria
programme.desc: Albert travels to Cambridge to accept a position as Chancellor of the university, leaving Victoria alone as London is ravaged by a deadly cholera epidemic. The crisis leads the queen to an encounter with eccentric physician John Snow, who is determined to end the crisis by discovering how the disease is spread - and a vital breakthrough is provided by a young nurse named Florence Nightingale. The Francatellis host an opening dinner for their new hotel, and Penge notices a growing attraction between Sophie and Joseph

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Captain Hastings is staying with friends when wealthy heiress Mrs Inglethorp is murdered. He calls in Hercule Poirot to help him solve the baffling crime, which has the whole household under suspicion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet as the Belgian sleuth, with Hugh Fraser, Pauline Moran, Anthony Calf and Philip Jackson

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear in the tiny village of Monks Barton amid rumours of witchcraft and haunted woods. As Barnaby and Jones investigate, psychic Cyrus LeVanu clashes with cleric Wallace Stone over their different methods of 'healing' the woods, while other locals seem to be caught up in a stolen antiques racket. When a body is unearthed and the death toll rises, the detectives race to catch the killer by finding a connection between the missing couples and the thefts. Anton Lesser guest stars, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective suspects a connection between the death of a student with secret plans for advancement and the killing of well-known criminal Nicky Turnball, who was in Oxford to speak at the Union. As Lewis and Hathaway eliminate suspects from a long list of the crook's enemies, the investigation brings him into contact with old flame Diane - who also happens to be Turnball's wife. Kevin Whately stars, with Laurence Fox and Gina McKee

programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Germany to investigate tales of a beast that has been on the prowl in European waters for the past 700 years. programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The fossil record shows that the arapaima fish has roamed the waters of the Amazon River since the Jurassic age, and uses its bony tongue to crush prey against the roof of its mouth before swallowing. programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.desc: Arthur must find a way of paying a £20,000 tax bill immediately, but fortunately Dave has a drastic solution - faking a drowning accident. programme.title: The Avengers

programme.desc: When a foreign student, an apparent cocaine trafficker, is shot dead, Cowley tasks Bodie and Doyle with targetting teenage traffickers who have diplomatic ties with South America. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins, Gordon Jackson and Alice Krige

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: In the heart of Central America lurks a marine creature believed to reach 8ft in length and weigh up to 300lbs. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is taken to breaking point as he re-evaluates everything he knows about fishing in an attempt to catch this monster - which is known to leap into boats and cause fatal injuries

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole goes green-laning in Oxfordshire, visits speed week in Yorkshire and tells the story of the Streetfighter, one of the most distinctive styles of modern motorbike

programme.title: Tour de France Highlights
programme.desc: Action from stage three of the most prestigious race on the calendar, featuring a 183km route from Lorient to Pontivy. programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: Michael faces a big day, as for the first time in his career, he is responsible for manoeuvring a 35-tonne plane into the correct position for take-off. Security supervisor Conor finds himself in a sticky situation with a padlock, and there is a look behind the scenes at the baggage hall, where 9,500 items of luggage pass through every day. Baggage agent Johnny is responsible for reuniting each lost item with its owner

programme.title: Yorkshire Airport
programme.desc: The staff prepares for the grand re-opening of the airport after millions have been spent on renovations, and Phil nervously awaits a visit from Transport Secretary Chris Grayling. An oversized piece of hand luggage causes trouble at the gate, and problems arise for Special Assistance Agent involving three special charter pilgrimage planes

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, airport staff are forced to cordon off a plane full of passengers when a runway is closed, and Ian turns detective

programme.title: Heathrow: Britain's Busiest Airport
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes of the airport, finding out how its infrastructure helps staff process thousands of passengers arriving from 84 countries. This time, passenger experience manager Demi deals with a medical emergency. Meanwhile, border force officer Rob returns to cross-examine unsuspecting passengers arriving into the UK

programme.title: The Purge (2013)
programme.desc: The American government responds to rising crime rates by introducing an annual 12-hour period when all laws are suspended, so the people can get violent impulses out of their system. programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew Scott help homeowners Renee and Brent with a long list of renovations, including a major kitchen makeover that is set to be costly for the couple

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Live International Rugby Union
programme.desc: British & Irish Lions v Japan (Kick-off 3.00pm). Lee McKenzie presents coverage of the Lions' first match on home soil since 2005, held at Murrayfield. This contest serves as a warm-up ahead of their tour of South Africa and the Cherry Blossoms, who reached the quarter-finals of the 2019 World Cup, could provide a stern test of their credentials as Warren Gatland assesses his squad. With analysis from Ian McGeechan, Sam Warburton and Bryan Habana

They have three children and seven grandchildren wanting to visit, so the pressure is on Jasmine to find a holiday home the whole family can enjoy. With a £72,000 budget, she shows them five options - but will any measure up to their expectations?

programme.title: Channel 4 News

Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back

programme.desc: Seyi Rhodes reports on the migrants being beaten back from the European Union by border guards on the notorious Balkan Route. A once-welcoming Europe is now closing its doors, and Serbia has become a bottleneck for thousands of people trying to get through the increasingly hostile route. Rhodes meets beaten and bruised men trying to leave Serbia, and witnesses the families living in government camps too frightened to make the journey. programme.title: Budget Hotels: Are They a Con?
programme.desc: Alexis Conran looks at the best and worst hotels the UK has to offer, hearing stories of nightmare stays, exposing the tricks of owners and revealing which online reviews to trust. Alexis also talks to a leading bedbug expert on how not to get bitten and visits a 'ghost hotel'

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Week By the Sea
programme.desc: The comedian visits seaside resorts around the UK, beginning in Great Yarmouth, where she is joined by Joe Pasquale. Susan starts her tour with a visit to the lord mayor, who sends her off with a list of things to see and do. She takes part in a synchronised swimming performance at Britain's last surviving circus building, takes a ride on a 1930s rollercoaster, and learns the secret of putting words into a stick of rock

programme.title: Great British Gardens with Carol Klein
programme.desc: Carol visits Bressingham Gardens in Norfolk, home of the Bloom dynasty of Norfolk horticulturists who introduced British gardeners to a wealth of plants and devised a revolutionary way to display them. Carol spends time with Adrian Bloom, whose ethos is to introduce the very best examples of plants that will grace even a tiny garden

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: The Ritz ranks high among London's most legendary hotels, one that has been synonymous with luxury and wealth, as well as being a bastion of privilege for over 100 years. Situated on Piccadilly, just a stone's throw from Buckingham Palace, it has been a home from home for the royal family since the reign of Edward VII. The Ritz has redefined service in luxury hotels, introducing the now-universal concept of the customer always being right. This programme examines its heritage, its famous afternoon teas and the scandalous history of its founder, Cesar Ritz

programme.title: Die Hard 4.0 (2007)

Action thriller sequel, with Bruce Willis, Timothy Olyphant, Justin Long and Maggie Q

programme.title: Spectacular Spain with Alex Polizzi
programme.desc: On the Costa Blanca, Alex reveals how thriving port Valencia has much more to offer than just its sandy beaches, sampling horchata, a sweet drink made from tiger nuts, and local speciality paella. She also visits the cathedral, where a small chapel houses an ancient chalice believed by some to be the Holy Grail. Further south is Benidorm, where Alex explores its transformation from a quiet fishing village to a high-rise holiday resort. Finally, she visits the tiny island of Tabarca, only a short boat trip away from the mainland but part of a very different world

programme.title: Building Britain's Canals
programme.desc: Dan Jones examines Britain's most iconic canals, beginning with the 152-mile Grand Union Canal, which runs up the spine of the country. Constructed at the height of the Industrial Revolution, the task challenged even the greatest engineering minds of the time, including pioneers such as James Brindley, the man behind Britain's first commercial canal, and William Jessop, the person with whom responsibility lay for the building of the main link from Birmingham to London. Travelling along its route, Dan experiences first-hand the innovations behind its construction, including the Blisworth tunnel

However, he soon finds there is a catch - he ends up stuck in an alternate world where none of his friends know who he is and where Rumpelstiltskin has become the kingdom's tyrannical ruler. programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted (2012)
programme.desc: The escaped zoo animals continue their quest to get back to their New York home. Having made it to Monte Carlo, they join a circus on a European tour as a means of travelling undetected - but an animal control agent is in hot pursuit. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, Chris Rock, David Schwimmer and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid (1994)
programme.desc: Wise karate mentor Mr Miyagi meets the orphaned teenage grand-daughter of a soldier who once saved his life. As well as guiding her through the trials of high school and her first romance, he takes her to a Zen monastery to hone her martial arts skills. Adventure sequel, starring Pat Morita, Hilary Swank, Michael Ironside and Constance Towers

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father, while her mother Sally and new boyfriend Ron leaves her feeling even more alone. For her 18th-birthday she's given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Deadpool (2016)
programme.desc: A fast-talking former mercenary develops terminal cancer, and agrees to be the subject in a shady experiment in the hope of a cure. The procedure leaves him horribly disfigured, but also possessing superhuman abilities which he immediately puts to use in a quest for revenge on the man responsible for his hideous appearance. Superhero comedy adventure, starring Ryan Reynolds and Morena Baccarin

programme.title: Upgrade (2018)
programme.desc: Technophobe Grey Trace is left confined to a wheelchair after being mugged. His only hope for revenge is Stem, an experimental computer chip implant that allows him to control his body. However, once implanted, Stem starts talking to Trace and takes over his body. Sci-fi thriller from Saw veteran Leigh Whannell, starring Logan Marshall-Green and Melanie Vallejo

programme.title: Hunt for the Wilderpeople (2016)
programme.desc: A 12-year-old brought up in the city is sent to be fostered by the good-natured Bella and her grumpy husband Hec, who live on a farm in rural New Zealand. When tragedy strikes. Ricky runs off into the wilderness, pursued by Hec - inadvertently sparking a national manhunt for the two of them. Comedy adventure written and directed by Taika Waititi, starring Sam Neill and Julian Dennison

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Meet Dave (2008)
programme.desc: Tiny emotionless aliens on a mission to save their homeworld travel to Earth aboard a spacecraft in human form, where they plan to drain the planet's oceans. However, the miniature explorers have a change of heart when they encounter Man - and are unprepared for their vessel falling in love. Sci-fi comedy, starring Eddie Murphy and Elizabeth Banks

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: The Nice Guys (2016)
programme.desc: A private detective investigates the murder of a porn star in 1970s Los Angeles, only to run into a hired thug employed to scare him off. However, the mysterious disappearance of a woman connected to the case forces the unlikely duo to work together, leading them to uncover a government conspiracy. Crime comedy, starring Russell Crowe and Ryan Gosling

programme.title: Disobedience (2017)
programme.desc: A woman returns to a strict Jewish community after her father dies. She was forced to leave because she was in love with her female friend, but once reunited their passions are rekindled. Drama, starring Rachel Weisz, Rachel McAdams and Alessandro Nivola

programme.title: The Principles of Lust (2003)
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is faced with a dilemma when he is forced to choose between a normal family life with his girlfriend and her son, or a hedonistic whirl of sex, drugs and rock 'n' roll with a risk-taking friend. Drama, starring Alec Newman, Marc Warren, Sienna Guillory and Lara Clifton

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community

programme.title: His Girl Friday (1940)
programme.desc: A conniving newspaper editor is horrified to learn his ex-wife - who is also happens to be his best reporter - is planning to remarry. Determined to keep her on his staff, he comes up with the one thing he knows she cannot resist - a big story. Meanwhile, he arranges it so that her fiance has a run of misfortune. Comedy, starring Cary Grant, Rosalind Russell and Ralph Bellamy

programme.title: The Million Pound Note (1954)
programme.desc: An eccentric multimillionaire bets his equally rich brother that if a man is known to be wealthy, he can obtain everything he needs on credit. To put this theory to the test, they give a £1million note to a penniless seaman, but instruct him never to spend it. Comedy adapted from a story by Mark Twain, starring Gregory Peck, Jane Griffiths, Joyce Grenfell and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Santa Fe Passage (1955)
programme.desc: A wagon scout accused of collusion with Apaches is given a chance to redeem himself when he is hired to transport a shipment of arms to Santa Fe. The owner of the valuable freight happens to be a mixed-race woman and at first he shows her only disrespect, but has to overcome his prejudice when he finds himself falling for her. Western adventure, with John Payne, Faith Domergue and Slim Pickens

programme.title: Shenandoah (1965)
programme.desc: A Virginian farmer is left to raise seven children after his wife dies. He tries to keep his family out of the American Civil War, but when Union troops abduct his son, and his son-in-law enlists with the Confederates, he is unable to maintain his neutral stance and is dragged into the conflict. Western, starring James Stewart, Doug McClure, Rosemary Forsyth, Katharine Ross and Patrick Wayne

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Ray's jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker

programme.title: American Ultra (2015)
programme.desc: Small-town store clerk and unmotivated stoner Mike is enjoying his life with girlfriend Phoebe when his world is suddenly turned upside down. He is unaware he is actually a highly trained, lethal government sleeper agent who has been targeted for assassination, forcing him to summon his inner action-hero in order to survive. Action comedy, starring Jesse Eisenberg and Kristen Stewart

programme.title: And Then We Danced (2019)
programme.desc: Merab and Irakli dance for the National Georgian Ensemble in Tbilisi. They begin a relationship, but are forced to keep it a secret because of the rigidly macho world in which they work. Drama, starring Levan Gelbakhiani and Bachi Valishvili. In Georgian with English subtitles

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre and Rainbow are furious when they see that Diane has been given poor lighting in her class photo and decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity towards all complexions. When Andre Jr claims there is unspoken colourism within the Johnson family, things get heated

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Sam aims for a celebration inspired by pixies, although his fiancee Luanne dreams of a traditional wedding like the one her parents had

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Big kid Phil wants a wedding that will go down in history. But his Liverpudlian bride-to-be Elle has her heart set on a classy day at the iconic Liver Building

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps working parents Jessica and CJ Braido, who feel they are being overrun by their four small children, and struggle to agree on what parenting methods to adopt

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: Two US couples from different backgrounds temporarily switch spouses as they navigate emotive issues such as politics, class, gender and race with the ultimate goal of everyone being able to find some common ground. here, the Benners and the McMichaels take part, as a perfectionist wife whose children act like grown-ups swaps places with a stay-at-home dad who thinks life is all about play

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Love Island star Jack Fincham begins a week of dinner parties, treating Abz Love, Tracy Beaker star Dani Harmer, Made in Chelsea's Mark Francis and Pants on Fire comedy duo Donna and Verona to a menu of European bistro favourites

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Abz Love hosts the second of the week's dinner parties with a little help from his mother, hoping to impress guests Jack Fincham, Dani Harmer, Mark Francis and Donna and Verona

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Comedy duo Donna and Verona host the third of the week's dinner parties, hoping to impress guests Jack Fincham, Dani Harmer, Mark Francis and Abz Love

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dani Harmer is the next to host, but having never chopped an onion before, let alone thrown a dinner party, it proves to be a night of firsts for the Tracy Beaker star

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The contest comes to a close at the home of Made in Chelsea stalwart Mark Francis, who hopes to win his guests over with a menu inspired by his Italian heritage. Mark is out to impress Love Island champion Jack Fincham, CBBC star Dani Harmer, boy band member Abz from Five and Pants on Fire comedy duo Donna and Veron

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Fremont, California, in an attempt to save a restaurant that is tearing the owners' marriage apart. Saki Kavouniaris took over Spin a Yarn in 1995 and began to turn it into a success, before marrying bartender Jennifer. When the business started to fail, the couple decided to splash out on refurbishments to recover their glory days, but their efforts have been futile and now their relationship is at stake

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. To make matters worse, the restaurant's food is less than appetising and its long-serving chef seems to be incompetent

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Baltimore, Maryland, where Denise Whiting has alienated customers by trademarking the word 'hon', a term of endearment used by the local community. When she opened Cafe Hon in 1992 it was a roaring success, but as a result of Denise's unwavering business ambition, people started to boycott the restaurant, leaving her frustrated by falling sales

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsie and Phemelo, Emily Atack and Kate Robbins, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, and Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv critique the week's TV. Shows including including American Pie, The Graham Norton Show, Love Island, Natural World - Walrus: Two Tonne Tusker, Killing Eve, Blind Date, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, and The Family Brain Game come under their gaze. First shown in June 2019

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shws including Line of Duty, Snackmasters, Alan Carr's Epic Gameshow, Mastermind, Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles, The Art of the Joy of Sex and Dr Pimple Popper. Plus, they observe BBC news coverage of the apparent spat between Dominic Cummings and Boris Johnson

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including Line of Duty, I Can See Your Voice, Beat the Chasers, Sex and the City, My Octopus Teacher, Catfish UK: The TV Show and The Earth at Night in Color. Plus, they offer comment on ITV's coverage of the apparent ease of access to the Prime Minister's personal telephone number

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The households share their critiques of Britain's Got Talent, Peaky Blinders, The Great British Sewing Bee, Storm Troupers: The Fight to Forecast the Weather, Secret Life of the Human Pups, Big Fish Man, and the News. First shown in May 2016

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When Morty complains that Rick's adventures are too frightening and traumatic, Rick allows him to lead their next expedition. Rick also provides the family with an inventive solution when they come to him with their trivial problems

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick helps Morty to win over his classmate Jessica - the girl of his dreams - by giving his grandson a potion that will make her attracted to him at the school dance. However, everything goes awry when the potion combines with the influenza virus and mutates it, leaving Rick in a race against time to find an antidote

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Morty becomes the father of an alien baby after convincing Rick to buy him a sexy robot from a pawnbroker during one of their adventures. However, when Rick and Summer visit the robot's home planet, they get trapped in what turns out to be a dangerous dimension. Guest starring Claudia Black and Richard Christy

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Unimpressed with what's on television, Rick hacks into the family's cable TV box and upgrades their viewing package to access programming from infinite realities. However, when Jerry, Beth and Summer use Rick's inter-dimensional goggles to view themselves in parallel timelines, it has a bad effect on family relationships

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, Chris Eubank Sr and Chris Eubank Jr, Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo, Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsie and Phemelo, Emily Atack and Kate Robbins, Gyles Brandreth and Sheila Hancock, and Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv critique the week's TV. Shows including including American Pie, The Graham Norton Show, Love Island, Natural World - Walrus: Two Tonne Tusker, Killing Eve, Blind Date, Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters, and The Family Brain Game come under their gaze. programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
