programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A wealthy 21-year-old who lives in a seven-bedroom mansion is sent to stay with a single mother in Salford, where he must learn to feed a family on less than £30 a week and discover how food banks work

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Mandy and Christian's Pride parade finally arrives, but what begins as a stressful day only gets worse when the generator powering the speakers packs up. Can the duo turn things around or will the the revellers be expected to dance to a silent soundtrack? Meanwhile, cockney limo driver Johnny Diamond books two big jobs on the same night, and Bury couple Andy and Sue settle in to their static caravan in the Spanish countryside

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Colin and Lizzy Whiting, who find themselves in the wealthiest 10 percent of Britain, swap their five-bedroom house near Newquay to spend a week living in a two-bed property where Sarah and Ross Timmins live. The Timmins on the other hand, are among the poorest 10 percent in the country, and survive on a tenth of the weekly budget the Withings have

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan help illusionist James in Dorset, who has neglected his career, his life, and his home following the recent loss of his parents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: It is estimated that more than a million vehicles in Britain are fitted with cloned number plates as criminals who switch them to pass by police cameras undetected. On the outskirts of Bradford, a suspected stolen car using cloned plates crashes after running a red light, leaving the occupants of another car with serious injuries, leaving officers to deal with the aftermath, while a manhunt is launched for the offenders

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The police in Bradford pursue a team of suspected car thieves, travelling at speeds of 80mph. North Yorkshire's Road Crime Team track down a stolen Land Rover Defender, but when a suspect makes a run for it into nearby woods, the officers are forced to give chase with nothing but a torch to help them catch their man

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Duggie and Mark show that they are as quick on their feet as they are behind the wheel when a serial offender tries to give them the runaround. A high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, PC Dan Myerscough loses patience with a silver-tongued drunk, and officers Martin and Hayley are called out to a 4x4 that has come a cropper due to treacherous ice

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Angus and Sean resort to smashing down a door in a desperate attempt to save a man's life, and Kev and Colin spot a car being driven in the wrong direction down a motorway. Darren encounters a pizza delivery man who is under the influence of alcohol, while out on patrol, Hayley observes the damage that can be caused by Cumbria's treacherously icy roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers patrol during Black Eye Friday - one of Cumbria's most alcohol-fuelled nights of the year, and help a woman trapped inside a burning car. Meanwhile, a boy racer is made to call his mother after being caught misbehaving, and a motorway pursuit is brought to an abrupt end

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall meets three more troublesome pets, encountering rampaging pug cross Dolly Parton, overzealous guard dog Ernie, and bullying top dog Blue

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Though Levi is given the all-clear by the hospital after the stage collapse, Sheila and Kyle remain deeply concerned. Yashvi and Ned realise their relationship needs a fresh start

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Christian gets caught up in treating a sky-diver's injuries during his foray to the airfield. Jasmine's first day as head nurse at the ICU does not go according to plan

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jean Robinson and Daithi Elliffe seek the help of architect Dermot Bannon to turn a listed 19th-century former schoolhouse at Kilternan, which has scenic views of the Dublin mountains, into their ideal family home. The property has been virtually disused for the past 30 years and is dank and dilapidated, with rotting floors, and the new homeowners are seeking a comfortable and bright dwelling with a modern layout. However, despite a generous budget of 360,000 euros, the constraints of a protected structure, a tight schedule and hidden costs begin to take their toll on the project

programme.title: Dream Kitchens and Bathrooms with Mark Millar
programme.desc: The DIY expert helps homeowners transform the most important rooms in the house. This time, Mark helps create a dream country cottage bathroom for £2,000 in a Leicestershire village for Chris and Celie, and an all-black-and-gold kitchen for £25,000 in Hove, Sussex

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: The Disappearance of Shannon Matthews
programme.desc: First in a two-part documentary about the disappearance of nine-year-old Shannon Matthews in Yorkshire in 2008, an investigation that gripped the nation, which turned out to be hoax kidnapping plot devised by her mother. Featuring exclusive interviews with Shannon's best friend, members of the local community, and the police officers who eventually found her, the programme reveals the remarkable truth of what really happened

programme.title: The Clues That Caught the Killer
programme.desc: Documentary examining the vital breakthroughs that helped police catch the killers of 60-year-old Sadie Hartley, who was immobilised with a stun gun and stabbed to death in her own home in January 2016. Detectives quickly identified two suspects, but only patient and thorough police work could uncover the evidence to secure a conviction

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A profile of Californian Edmund Kemper, who murdered his grandparents as a teenager and, upon release from a secure hospital after five years, went on to kill six college girls, his mother and her best friend. The programme examines whether his mind was twisted by his upbringing in a broken home and volatile relationship with a domineering mother

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: From endless food and drink to hotels with kids' clubs and water parks, going all-inclusive is supposed to be all about hassle-free fun in the sun. But for some, this option proves anything but relaxing. Here cameras follow the unlucky holidaymakers whose breaks went horribly wrong. They include nurse Julia Vaughan, who spent more than £5,500 on a relaxing break in Crete for herself and her family, only to be confronted by a giant construction site next to their hotel

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the backstage murder of a dancer while attending a special presentation of the Rostov Ballet. Angela Lansbury stars as the amateur sleuth, with Tom Bosley

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the demise of a flamboyant hypnotist, who died behind locked doors in front of an audience of mesmerised journalists. Mystery drama, guest starring Jose Ferrer

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica takes over a congressman's seat in Washington while trying to find out who was responsible for his murder - but political shenanigans and sinister goings-on conspire to keep her from solving the crime. Mystery, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway actress comes out of retirement to star with her daughter in a musical produced by her son - but soon finds her life in danger. Luckily, Jessica has been invited along to see the show by nephew Grady and decides to investigate. Guest starring Vivian Blaine and Lorna Luft, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica sets out to prove the innocence of an old friend who has become the prime suspect in a murder case that began with the discovery of a body at a mystery writers' convention. Angela Lansbury stars, with Paul Sand and Diana Muldaur

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's car breaks down, leaving her stranded in the middle of nowhere, and she is forced to take a bus - unaware that one of her fellow passengers is a murderer. Guest starring Linda Blair (The Exorcist)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica injures her leg in a minor accident at an airport and is admitted to hospital - where she soon uncovers foul play. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's trip to Palm Springs to see her old college room-mate is marred by the murder of her friend's husband, an unpopular celebrity with links to organised crime. Guest starring Piper Laurie (Twin Peaks), with Angela Lansbury as the amateur sleuth

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica travels to Wyoming to attend the funeral of an old friend, but instead finds herself investigating the mysterious death of a man everyone despised. Noah Beery Jr (The Rockford Files) and Stella Stevens (Flamingo Road) guest star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher assumes the guise of a wealthy widow and checks in at a luxury tropical hotel to help an old friend resolve a crisis and trap a murderer. Mystery, guest starring Cyd Charisse

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: .Plans to build a new hotel in Cabot Cove are put on hold when diggers discover the remains of an American Revolution war hero that had been buried on the construction site. Starring Angela Lansbury and John Astin

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself embroiled in a murder case in New York while visiting her niece, who has a part in a soap opera in which the actor playing a victim is killed. Starring Angela Lansbury and Terry Kiser

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher goes back to college to receive an honorary degree, only to become embroiled in a murder investigation when the body of an infamous fellow writer is found. Starring Angela Lansbury and James Sutorius

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins leads a sting operation to take down child pornographer Teddy Hawkins, also well-known as the owner of a chain of successful restaurants. However, when the team examines Teddy's cyber credentials, they discover he is connected to Deputy Commissioner Abraham, who vehemently denies any involvement in Hawkins' illicit distribution ring. With two high-profile arrests to their name, Rollins and her colleagues must work quickly to justify their actions before Abraham uses his power to make the charges 'go away'. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A rape charge Barba is bringing against a popular actor is placed in jeopardy, prompting Rollins to step in and take matters into her own hands. Crime drama, starring Raul Esparza and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when Libby Parker is followed home by a gang of teenagers, and raped in the courtyard of her apartment block. Hundreds of windows overlooked the scene of the crime, but not one of the residents who witnessed the attack called the police. The prosecutors face an even more difficult dilemma when it emerges none of Libby's neighbours are willing to make a statement either. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Notorious serial killer Gregory Williams Yeats concocts an elaborate plan to free himself from incarceration by co-operating with one-time nemesis Dr Carl Rudnick. When the pair ultimately break out of prison, Chicago detectives Lindsay and Dawson head to New York on the trail of fugitives, and the SVU team is enlisted to help bring the pair back to justice. The first of a two-part cross-over episode with Chicago PD, guest starring Sophia Bush and Jon Seda

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The New York police drama returns for its tenth and final series. A woman is found shot dead two days after attending a party thrown by fashion designer Nyle Brite. A search of her home uncovers a large selection of wigs, condoms and clothes by the designer, plus a number of nasty text messages on her phone, leading the team to wonder whether she moonlighted as a high-class prostitute. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames are called out to an apparent suicide, but come to different initial conclusions as to whether Theresa Esperna actually killed herself or was murdered. Further investigation reveals that she worked at a bank whose only client was the Catholic Church and her specific role was to manage the trust fund set up to pay compensation settlements in sexual abuse cases involving priests. Crime drama, starring Kathryn Erbe and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to see how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Footage includes communities fighting back as neighbourhood watch takes on new meaning, thugs on a housing estate caught in the act, and an elderly resident attacking an intruder with her walking stick

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp

programme.title: Columbo: The Conspirators (1978)
programme.desc: A terrorist posing as an Irish author heads a peace organization while secretly running guns for the IRA in Belfast. When he kills an arms dealer who tried to swindle him, the writer is sure he has covered his tracks - until Columbo shambles on to the scene. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Clive Revill, Jeanette Nolan and Bernard Behrens

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy

programme.title: Columbo: Murder Under Glass (1978)
programme.desc: The crumpled detective applies his well-honed instincts to a case of blackmail and murder in the world of haute cuisine when a restaurant owner is found dead after throwing a renowned food critic off his premises. Crime drama from The Silence of the Lambs director Jonathan Demme, starring Peter Falk, Louis Jourdan, Shera Danese and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr

programme.title: Columbo: Murder by the Book (1971)
programme.desc: An author of mystery novels kills his former writing partner so he can claim sole credit for their collaborations, and tries to appear innocent by offering to help Columbo solve the crime. Detective drama, directed by Steven Spielberg, starring Peter Falk, Jack Cassidy, Rosemary Forsyth and Barbara Colby

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and her team participate in a city-wide operation to close in on people charged with exploiting underage Catholic schoolchildren, with judges, legislators, lawyers and even members of the NYPD all inplicated in the scandal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: One of the NYPD's own is implicated in a cover-up, and the SVU tries to unravel a complex sex trafficking operation with roots in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Falacci investigate the murder of a grand jury witness, and uncover serious flaws in the case against a group of American footballers accused of rape. As inquiries proceed, suspicion falls on the motives of an ambitious Bronx assistant DA and his wife, who have a lot riding on the outcome of the trial. Crime drama, starring Chris Noth and Alicia Witt

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A programmer working for a defence contractor's cyberwarfare department falls to his death from an apartment building. Goren and Eames discover he was a hacker secretly employed by a rival company under a false identity, and a woman claiming to be a friend of the victim says they were actually on a mission to destroy both businesses. Guest starring Michael Kelly (House of Cards) and Jeri Ryan (Body of Proof)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Wall Street CEO David Kellen is gunned down in the street shortly after his night out with a model is cut short when an old flame makes an appearance. Goren and Eames find themselves embroiled in the upmarket Manhattan matchmaking scene when they investigate, and the victim's deputy reveals that his boss may have made enemies by leaking information about a forthcoming merger between two major companies

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs revisits his home town to investigate an assault that left one marine dead and another badly injured, and enlists the help of his estranged father to identify the assailant. Suspicion initially falls on a local man whose daughter was dating the survivor of the attack - but later inquiries uncover a tangled tale of uncertain paternity and forbidden love. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Ralph Waite

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine is found murdered in his garage, and inquiries lead the agents to his former sergeant. However, Gibbs and the team soon find out that their man is under FBI witness protection as he is about to testify against a mobster, giving him a cast-iron alibi. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Joe Spano

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Bernard investigate the murder of memoir writer Sweetie Ness. Clues initially lead them to suspect his stalker, agent and a groupie, but after digging deeper into the victim's past, they begin to consider the possibility he was not who he claimed to be

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman's murder leads Lupo and Bernard to learn she was secretly in conflict with her husband, going against his desire that their family lead an environmentally friendly life. The case is complicated further when a dead passenger and drugs turn up in the car she was using, with the complexity continuing in the courtroom as Cutter suspects someone has been tampering with evidence. Guest starring Ned Beatty (Deliverance) and Sherry Stringfield (ER)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A narcotics detective plans a major drugs sting but makes the mistake of illegally using a teenager as bait - with fatal consequences. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates when a journalist is found murdered, but the case presents new evidence for an old crime involving a man serving a life sentence for spying for the Chinese government. Keith Carradine guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl is killed in a crime displaying all the hallmarks of white supremacists who recruit teenagers to carry out acts of violence, and the team races to bring the ringleader to justice before more youngsters are butchered. Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis re-examine a case closed since the 1960s after a vehicle containing the remains of a murdered man is dredged up from the Hudson River. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A serial killer begins posting footage of his crimes online - and as the agents investigate, they realise that each film contains visual clues to the identity of the next victim. In a further bizarre twist, Abby later finds what seems to be a new video on her computer - and the case takes on fresh urgency with the discovery that it is actually a live feed, suggesting the murderer is somewhere on the premises

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bank at Quantico is robbed and a security guard killed, but the team soon discovers that stealing money may not have been the perpetrators' primary objective. Meanwhile, Gibbs is given the task of evaluating an inexperienced new agent assigned by Vance to help investigate the case. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rey Valentin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs sends DiNozzo and Ziva to retrieve top-secret information from a secure military base - a mission aimed at catching a mole in the NCIS ranks. Unfortunately, it soon becomes clear that the traitor is still at large - so the building is locked down and all agents are rounded up in a final effort to catch the culprit. Guest starring Jude Ciccolella

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine sergeant, who was hailed as a war hero in the States for his efforts overseas. Gibbs turns to medic Grace Confalone for advice after he uncharacteristically unravels and abandons his team at a crime scene investigation. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An activist fighting for the rights of the Tamil people survives an assassination attempt at JFK airport, but it soon becomes clear that members of her close circle have also been targeted. Logan and Wheeler are soon on the case - and the investigation puts them on the trail of an unlikely Canadian gun-for-hire as they race to catch the would-be killer. Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames discover a strange link between three murder victims - all have children who have been selected to go on the waiting list for an exclusive New York pre-school. Their inquiries eventually lead them to a distraught mother whose pushy mother-in-law has unwittingly driven her to kill - and end in a hostage crisis. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren infiltrates the psychiatric ward of a New York jail, without the knowledge of his superiors, to investigate disturbing allegations by his inmate nephew that prisoners are being systematically abused, tortured and even killed by sadistic guards. Drama, starring Vincent d'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: While investigating the execution-style killing of three college students on a basketball court, Logan struggles to understand what appears to be a motiveless triple murder. At a loss to identify a reason for the shooting, he must rely on the testimony of a survivor of the attack if he is to bring the killers to justice

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Bing Cullman suffers a heart attack and dies in his cellar shortly after hosting a wine tasting to sell rare vintages he unearthed in a basement. It seems like a straightforward case, but Goren and Eames find traces of a drug in a glass that would have reacted with the victim's medication and resulted in his death. Guest starring Adrian Pasdar (Heroes)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the death of a wealthy philanthropist on the night he awarded his research grant to a doctor. After a medical cadaver is found wearing the victim's clothes, the detectives' attention soon turns to the recipient of the money and the two other candidates, and discover they all had a motive to commit the murder. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant peruse a selection of the public's potentially valuable items on a visit to the Fleet Air Arm Museum at HMS Heron in Yeovilton, Somerset. Meanwhile, host Paul Martin travels to Forde Abbey, which was once home to Cistercian monks, and meets a family who have inherited a religious heritage that influences their everyday lives

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team heads to Exeter in Devon, where Paul Martin visits the summer house of acclaimed novelist Agatha Christie. The famous cathedral also plays host to the valuation day, and Caroline Hawley and Mark Stacey put their skills to the test at auction

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Antiques experts James Lewis and Anita Manning try to get their hands on the best items to be sold at auction in Sheffield - and an autograph book signed by the Beatles and a German porcelain figure are among the treasures that catch their eyes. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Flog It!

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Paramedic Lee fights to save a biker badly injured in a collision with a car, while Lisa tries to reassure his wife who was thrown from the pillion in the impact. The team also fights to treat a chauffeur trapped in his hi-tech car and a horseman in agony after a freak hunting fall

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea

Meanwhile, in the waters off Anglesey, as they go to the rescue of a father and his 13-year-old son, the crew of Moelfre station uncover a story of survival and heroism

programme.desc: Part one of two. A terrifying new creature that not even the Asgard can control threatens Earth, meaning O'Neill has to try to save the planet as well as the team. With Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A deadly virus sweeps through Atlantis causing the entire expedition, apart from Teyla and Ronon, to lose their memories. Together they must rally the rest of the crew to find a cure before the memories that remain fade entirely. Starring Rachel Luttrell

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: An away team encounters a powerful destructive force known as the Crystalline Entity while conducting a land survey on Melona Four. Riker manages to shepherd the human colonists into a cave, but the air supply is limited and contact with the Enterprise is cut off. Jonathan Frakes stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The crew learns T'Pol has been ordered to leave the ship by the Vulcan High Command, who blame her and Archer for the destruction of a sacred temple. Starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Major Kira Nerys clashes with her people when she opposes the government's decision to mine one of Bajor's moons for badly needed resources on environmental grounds. Sci-fi drama, starring Avery Brooks and Nana Visitor

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The team investigates when a plane that mysteriously crashed into the Pacific in the 1980s is found, but with a recently murdered scuba diver inside. Meanwhile, Quinn is arrested for money laundering

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A fun night out for three teenagers takes a dangerous turn, and when Melinda steps in to investigate an unsolved kidnapping, she finds herself in more danger than she anticipated. Paranormal drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A detective whose career was just starting out in the 1980s discusses investigating Peter Sutcliffe, the notorious Yorkshire Ripper, who murdered 13 women between 1975 and 1981

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The case of serial killer Gary Ridgway, who has confessed to murdering 71 teenage girls and women across Washington state through the 1980s and 1990s

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The presenter explores the case of John Straffen, who killed two young girls in the summer of 1951. He was found to be unfit to plead and committed to Broadmoor Hospital, but during a brief escape from the facility in 1952 he killed again. It was determined that the cause of his behaviour was severe brain damage, traced back to an attack of encephalitis as a child in India. When he died in 2007, he was the longest-serving prisoner in Britain

programme.desc: Officers raid a cannabis farm and police are called to a fight in a pub car park. Documentary following the work of Greater Manchester Police

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Stories of famous horses from the regiment's past, including Sefton, the mount wounded by an IRA bomb. The newest equine member of the troop, Freddy, is gently handled when he is ridden for the first time. The trainee tank drivers' tests, however, are far more gruelling, as they take the vehicles cross-country while learning to drive for war

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Princess Anne discusses preparations for the Queen's Birthday Parade, as the Knightsbridge Barracks undergo last-minute rehearsals. Meanwhile, the trainees in the riding school come under pressure as classes intensify, and their instructor struggles to ensure all candidates make the grade

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Ron persuades Gary to make a profitable trip back to 1940. Time-travelling comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary is concerned when Yvonne decides she wants to move house, and a tall, dark stranger enters Phoebe's life. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: She Did That ()
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of successful black businesswomen Luvvie Ajayi, Lisa Price, Melissa Butler and Tonya Rapley

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient (1964)
programme.desc: Two wealthy teenage girls idolise a womanising pianist and follow him around New York, thwarting his efforts to seduce a married woman. Slapstick comedy, with Peter Sellers, Tippy Walker, Merrie Spaeth and Tom Bosley

programme.title: Miracle in Soho (1957)
programme.desc: A cynical road-repairer falls for the alluring charms of an Italian girl working as a barmaid, only to discover she and her family are planning to move to Canada. Romantic drama written by Emeric Pressburger, starring John Gregson, Belinda Lee and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica.

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's second Vengeance weapon, the deadly V2 rocket, which was responsible for killing 3,000 people in London and the south of England during six terrifying months

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Personal reminiscences from Frenchmen who were forced by the Nazis to build ramps and construct rockets, and a look at the site of Hitler's supergun that was trained on London

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Tony employs his first female chauffeur, who causes a walk-out among the other drivers. Maggie's father comes to visit, and disapproves of Tony's lavish lifestyle

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists.

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: Saturday Church (2017)
programme.desc: Ulysses, a shy, bullied 14-year-old, lives with his mother, Amara, and younger brother. Given the recent passing of his father, Ulysses' Aunt Rose, agrees to help take care of him and his sibling while their mother is at work. He soon stumbles across a vibrant transgender community while trying to find his own identity. Writer/director Damon Cardasis's drama, starring Luka Kain, Regina Taylor and Margot Bingham

programme.title: Sex Ed (2014)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives at a new school, and is appalled to discover his teenage students are receiving no sex education. He takes it upon himself to provide the facts of life, despite objection from the local preacher. However, his plan is complicated by his still being a virgin and falling in love with a pupil's older sister. Comedy, starring Haley Joel Osment and Lorenza Izzo

programme.desc: Ron persuades Gary to make a profitable trip back to 1940. Time-travelling comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and Dervla Kirwan

programme.title: Goodnight Sweetheart
programme.desc: Gary is concerned when Yvonne decides she wants to move house, and a tall, dark stranger enters Phoebe's life. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Dervla Kirwan and Michelle Holmes

programme.title: On the Up
programme.desc: Tony employs his first female chauffeur, who causes a walk-out among the other drivers. Maggie's father comes to visit, and disapproves of Tony's lavish lifestyle

programme.title: Pick of the Litter (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary following a litter of puppies from the moment they are born through an intense two-year odyssey as they train to become guide dogs

programme.title: Dead of Night (1945)
programme.desc: A group of people gather at a country house where their supernatural stories become all too real for one of the guests, who realises they're all part of his recurring nightmare. Horror anthology, starring Mervyn Johns, Michael Redgrave and Googie Withers

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams

programme.title: In the Doghouse (1961)
programme.desc: A newly qualified vet struggles to compete against an unscrupulous rival. Comedy, starring Leslie Phillips, Peggy Cummins, Hattie Jacques and James Booth

programme.title: Hell Is a City (1960)
programme.desc: A tough criminal escapes from jail and hatches a scheme to rob a wealthy bookie, little realising a hardened copper is hot on his trail. Thriller, starring Stanley Baker, John Crawford, Donald Pleasence and Billie Whitelaw

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's second Vengeance weapon, the deadly V2 rocket, which was responsible for killing 3,000 people in London and the south of England during six terrifying months

programme.title: Spotlight London
programme.desc: Interviews about arts and events showcasing London's vibrant culture scene

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Estate agent Brian Carlisle holds an open day at the Catrigg Force waterfall near Ribblesdale, hoping to attract potential buyers to the landmark. Plus, potholing enthusiasts Jude Onions and Johnny Latimer get married at Ingleborough cave, and Adrian Edmondson meets 10-year-old Daisy Watkiss, who hosts a weekly show on community station Drystone Radio

programme.title: The Dales
programme.desc: Adrian Edmondson visits Middleham to meet racehorse trainer Simon West, who hopes to turn around the fortunes of the local stables. The presenter also catches up with farmers Carol and Phillip Mellin, who have embarked on a new venture breeding and training sheepdogs, while villagers in Swaledale hold a remembrance service to commemorate the 60th anniversary of the Hudswell air disaster

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Pretentious Alan, violent Kix and sex-mad Eleanor are part of a 1960s group of poets, artists and angry young men who convene for a weekend of amusement at a large villa overlooking the sea. Comedy, starring Peter Richardson, Adrian Edmondson, Dawn French, Jennifer Saunders and Rik Mayall

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Richmond and Bellingham for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Baseline (2010)
programme.desc: A bouncer at an East London grime club saves the life of the local crime boss who owns the establishment. As reward, he is promoted to the position of manager but finds himself plunged into the criminal underworld when he is forced to turn a blind eye to a vast array of illegal activities. Crime thriller, starring Jamie Foreman, Dexter Fletcher, Zoe Tapper, Gordon Alexander, Freddie Connor and Sheraiah Larcher

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)
programme.desc: In 2008, rookie journalist Jay Bahadur forms a plan to embed himself among the pirates of Somalia, and provides a rare profile of these men and the forces that drive them. Fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino and Evan Peters

programme.title: William: The Making of a King
programme.desc: Documentary about the future king, containing exclusive footage and interviews, which was made when William was preparing to go to Eton

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: The team visits a Northamptonshire hotel that needs to make improvements, tackles cockroaches in a kitchen in Brent, north London, and makes a surprise inspection on a busy office to find out what dangers workers face when eating lunch at their desks

programme.title: News Rewind
programme.desc: A digest of news and events from across London from the past few days.

programme.title: Talking Points
programme.desc: A chance to catch up on debates about the issues behind the headlines

programme.title: Fairy Tales for You
programme.desc: An animated version of The Gingerbread Man read by Rik Mayall

programme.title: Fairy Tales for You
programme.desc: An animated version of Aladdin read by Rik Mayall

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Gorgo and Akka isolated far from the flock and witness an aurora borealis

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: The flock is trying to have a well-deserved rest when they are kept awake by Reggie the partying bat

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Taste of Marley
programme.desc: Rohan Marley, son of legendary musician Bob Marley, reconnects with his roots as he goes on a journey to explore the food and music of his native Jamaica.

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: The trainee troopers prepare for their final riding exam over one of the Army's toughest courses. Originally hopeless horseman Glenn is apprehensive - as is Adrian Van Loon, whose kit often fails to meet the rigorous standards. Gunners from the armoured regiment practise on the firing range with live ammunition, and the Household Cavalry's historian talks about their role in the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: After passing their riding course - one of the toughest in the country - the new troopers graduate. The latest additions to the regiment parade in full ceremonial uniform to mark the occasion - but the last such outing of the season also provides a chance for the soldiers to reflect on fallen comrades in conflicts from World War Two to Iraq

programme.title: Blackmail (1929)
programme.desc: A woman accidentally kills a would-be attacker in self-defence, and quickly flees the scene - but a sinister figure witnesses the event and attempts to blackmail her. Atmospheric early Hitchcock thriller, starring John Longden, Anny Ondra, Sara Allgood and Charles Paton

programme.title: The World of Henry Orient (1964)
programme.desc: Two wealthy teenage girls idolise a womanising pianist and follow him around New York, thwarting his efforts to seduce a married woman. Slapstick comedy, with Peter Sellers, Tippy Walker, Merrie Spaeth and Tom Bosley

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tour exploring and revealing Shadwell and Grove Park for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: London Live News
programme.desc: News headlines, travel, weather and debate from across the capital

programme.title: Noor Riyadh: A Festival of Light
programme.desc: Highlights from Noor Riyadh , the new citywide annual festival of light and art that nurtures creativity, promotes talent and delivers awe-inspiring experiences

programme.title: The Food Inspectors
programme.desc: Chris Hollins and Gaby Roslin find out exactly what's in chicken nuggets, comparing the shop-bought variety with home-made ones, and Matt Allwright reports on the single biggest problem facing the poultry industry - campylobacter, a bacteria and common cause of food poisoning that can be deadly. Chris gets a lesson in the best way to clean and cook herbs from Michelin-starred chef Atul Kochhar, and Coventry food safety officer Nicki inspects a takeaway, where she is horrified to come across the worst infestation of cockroaches she has ever seen

programme.title: The Fixers
programme.desc: Four passionate builders, in ten remote locations, have one mission: to improve lives. They will do whatever it takes-saving the world, one build at a time

programme.title: Queensbury Boxing League
programme.desc: Boxers battle it out over three four and five two minute rounds against opponents - the most successful competitors will earn the right to challenge for the coveted Queensbury British title

programme.title: Go With Me (2015)
programme.desc: A woman returns to the isolated logging community where she grew up, and is stalked by a former cop, who now heads up a criminal organisation in the area that operates above the law. She resolves to take a stand against him, seeking the aid of a retired logger and his sidekick. Thriller based on Castle Freeman Jr's novel, starring Julia Stiles, Anthony Hopkins, Alexander Ludwig and Ray Liotta

programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Spivs (2004)
programme.desc: A professional con-man spends his time honing the skills of his protege and making sure his gang of conniving criminals stays out of trouble. However, when a simple heist backfires the ragtag group are left with a lorry-load of illegal immigrants on their hands - and an angry smuggler with revenge on his mind soon adds to their woes. Crime drama, starring Ken Stott,, Nick Moran and Dominic Monaghan

programme.title: Noor Riyadh: A Festival of Light
programme.desc: Highlights from Noor Riyadh , the new citywide annual festival of light and art that nurtures creativity, promotes talent and delivers awe-inspiring experiences

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings

Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings
